name: E_perp_E_para_amplitudes
app_r_label: E_∥ / E_⊥ projection amplitudes (Tier 1 — cut-and-project algebra)
tier: Tier 1 (algebraic identity from φ minimal polynomial)

extra.derivation_note: Standard H_4/H_3 cut-and-project amplitudes from the icosahedral projection R^6 → E_∥ ⊕ E_⊥. The ratio E_⊥²/E_∥² = φ⁻² is the algebraic source of: (a) sin²θ_W^bare = φ⁻³ via volume cube (V3 Ch04 §4.3.1, Theorem U.9), (b) the App ZN gauge-sector coupling weights Z_1 = 41/6 / (120·|E_⊥|²) and Z_2 = 19/6 / (18·|E_∥|²). Tier 1: pure algebraic identity from φ² = φ + 1.
